Velium Crystal Staff  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 21
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: -5 STA: -5 WIS: +2 INT: +2
Effect: Frost Strike (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 20
WT: 5.5 Size: TINY
Class: CLR MNK NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2009 at 3:08 PM Rating: Decent

Scholar
93 posts
some bonehead has this up on the rathe for 95k...i want to strangle him with it

and then use it on a monk
▲ Page top
bah
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2023 at 1:02 AM Rating: Decent
LydiusInsidious
Scholar
108 posts
they're not a bone head and under todays market they average around 1.5 million to 2 million plat.

for starters, yeah stats and ratio suck but this is meant for twinks and they're generally maxed out anyways but that proc and it's magic only? so you can dw, insane!

secondly the proc gets around the damage cap, easily. it does a lot of damage especially dual wielding as a monkie.

anyyyyways for 95k considering what's available at that level, it's arguably one of the best 1hb usable for bst/mnk until level 45ish
▲ Page top
by the way
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2008 at 6:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759155384
55 posts
This is a fun chanter item at levels 20-55ish. With Tolapumj robe and self haste, get a shammy dex buff and use dex and HoT and DS potions. It will proc often. Use your color stuns and runes and you can actually solo melee with shiny bob!

This is a very rare item, btw. I've only seen it twice in the Bazaar, and I bought them both. A couple of days ago I bought one for 500p and resold it for 24k within 12 hours because I don't have a toon that can actually use it anymore.

Edited, Jul 20th 2008 8:06pm by qlipoth
▲ Page top
Updated Information
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2007 at 9:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591925840701
6 posts
This item NO LONGER procs at level one. It now doesn't proc until level 20, which still isn't terrible ... it is certainly a nice boost for those caster classes that are still holding onto the idea that they are battle wizards. You have another five levels or so to hold onto that dream ... then you can move onto an item with a higher INT bonus, or one that provides you with a decent focus.

-- ZARKODS
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

Level 20 PROC now SHEESH

70 posts
Boy, I remember this proccing at L 1 on my alts.. L 17... Your will is not sufficient to command this weapon. :( I'll post what level it is finally useable. talk about nerf.
▲ Page top
wow
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2004 at 1:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774502315
View User Forum
142 posts
picked this bitty up in bazaar on drinal while on my mule for 1000pp, saw the name first and clicked thinking I have never seen this up ever in 3 years playing. Low and behold its got a snowchipper proc on it, come to find out it procs at lvl1, with no lvl restrict. I would price this to sell, if I were to sell it at no less then 20k.

On drinal current price of Tstaff is 25-40k still, and that doesnt proc till 30 or 45, A Baton of Royal Stature 11 22 proc 120DD is 25-40k, given this is lower dmg delay, but rare as hell, I would think 20k easy.

IMHO
▲ Page top
RE: wow
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2004 at 9:23 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1623630270841
251 posts
Actually at the time you posted t-staff was at a max of 15-20k. Since i started playing i have never seen t-staff above 25k on drinal
▲ Page top
1 of the best twink items in the game
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 9:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255037618
231 posts
I spent 4.9k in the Bazaar for it this week. I don't care what the average price says, it's was worth it. I just made a new cleric and I am taking out red conning mobs with this with little trouble, yellow mobs with ease. Procs around 90dd at lvl 1 and works up to 149 at lvl 30. Considering that it's a rare drop and almost everyone I know has an monk, cleric or int caster alt, I would say if you see it for sale buy it! Took me months of looking to find one. I don't know the proc rate yet as my lvl 5 cleric kills anything she fights with 1 proc but it procs roughly every other kill so far. Considering that fight's don't even last 10 hits, that's pretty sick.

Edited, Wed Oct 29 21:54:59 2003
▲ Page top
RE: 1 of the best twink items in the game
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2004 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255037618
231 posts
This item has been slightly nerfed but not by much. It now procs at lvl 20. but that's still one of the biggest procs you can get off a weapon at lvl 20 so IMO still worth way more than 3-4k.

The real reason this is so good...
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249514905
12 posts
This weapon procs at level ONE. Yes, level one. Slizther had one on Fennin and I was watchin him duel and he was indeed proccing it at 15 or so. When you're only hittin for 19 without your dmg bonus at low lvls that 150 proc is amazing. Munkeys gettin this usually would have their epics and an SoS or at least a Tstaff by then, so if you see this on a monk it's gonna be on a twink most likely.

monk weapons
QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 4:45 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you are using your fists at 50, you need to invest in a tranquil staff =P. 29/32, procs 100 blows, 100 or so pt dd +stun. Sicc damage. Toss haste in and a monk mows down just about anything in his path. (if you can score a ton po's, it gets even sicker, though that probably isn't attainable by purchase =P)
▲ Page top
RE: monk weapons
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2001 at 7:20 AM Rating: Default
Ronaan
45 posts
Tranquil Staff is 29/30, unresistable 120dd + stun proc, and is as rare as a snowball in hell.

Ton Po's Bo Stick of Understanding = non existant.
▲ Page top
RE: monk weapons
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 10:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764633424
36 posts
hahahahahahahahahhahahahaha, damn newbs, things like this make me want to stay away from these boards. at level 50, hands are very good... you don't "need" weapons. in some cases it is good to have them, but you don't just magically get 75k once you get to level 50... not to mention that money isn't easy to come by, you have to get other equipment... i think the average person could prolly get an IFS or RFS at 50 if they sold most of their stuff... and thats only like 20k
other thing, tranquil staffs are nice but me personally (though i don't know a lot about monks) think that the 10 weight on them makes them a little bit of a burden, nevertheless, the proc more than makes up for it.. correct me if i am wrong, but isn't it a 175dd?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 2:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ton Po's only dropped on Test u item database EQ n00b ...

QuoteReply
# May 16 2001 at 2:30 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
a couple things:
first, tranquil staff is 29/30 not 29/32...
second, it isn't as easy as it sounds to invest in one, they are VERY rare and people ask for 75k for em :)

Mnk & Wt
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 7:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757294954
15 posts
I have GOT to be missing something. All this garbage about mnk wt allow 14. Feeeh. Must be important to high mnks as I am only lv9. I regularly carry More than DOUBLE my entire wt allowance and still manage to thump hell out of even to yellow mobs. Sure it slows down my Run Away! speed and gives an AC hit but I still manage fine. Soooo, any mnk wanting to toss this in the garbage just aim it in my direction. 8<)
I'll recycle it happily! Str 75 Wt 186 (hey i'm taking it easy today!)
▲ Page top
RE: Mnk & Wt
QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 7:49 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755936927
73 posts
Don't get used to carrying that much crap around, my friend. yeah sure, at level 9 you're only losing maybe 20-30 points of AC (which is a decent amount BTW), but later levels it really starts kicking your ***. I don;t play a monk, but one of my partners does, and his ac at lv 27 naked is like 500 or thereabouts, with armor it's in the mid 600's, and when armored and overburdened by pHatLeWT (all that silver) he's dropped down to about 425 ish. Being the party cleric, I KNOW when he's carrying too much crap.

▲ Page top
RE: No monk
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 6:46 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
frost strike is a 150dd i think alot of monks would love this weapon. the weight may be a little much but by lvl 50 youve gained an extra 4stone to your max load anyways and the dmg that 5 str would do compared to the dmg the proc will do makes it null. but im just a mage with a lvl 35 monk twink so i cant realy answer for the elders infact it would be best if you only let caster roll on it this way ill have a better shot of getting it for my twink anyways :P
▲ Page top
RE: No monk
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 7:07 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
Fighting batons, which you can get from Dalnir's crypt at lev 30, are 8/20, 2.0 weight, no hits to STA and STR. The proc is really the only thing going for this weapon, but the weight is a serious issue. In a prolonged battle, the weight drains your stamina quickly.

Of course, by the level you have to be to obtain this item, your fists make a better weapon (especially if you have your epic).

▲ Page top
